description_long: This is a modern, wall-mounted range hood with a sleek, curved front panel and a smooth, metallic finish. The front features a prominent vent grille at the bottom, likely for air intake or exhaust, while the sides are gently arched, giving the unit a streamlined appearance. The underside is flat and dark, possibly housing the main filter and fan assembly, and is bordered by a thin metallic frame. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible buttons or control panels, emphasizing clean lines and a contemporary aesthetic. The materials appear to be primarily metal, likely stainless steel, with some plastic or composite elements for the vent and possible internal components. This range hood would typically be found above a stove or cooktop in a kitchen, blending functionality with modern design.
description: A sleek, curved metallic range hood with a vented front grille and minimalist design, featuring a smooth, modern finish and a flat, dark underside.
description_view_0: Front view shows the curved metallic face and the prominent vent grille at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the arched profile and the depth of the unit, with a subtle seam and no visible controls.
description_view_2: Bottom view reveals a flat, dark surface likely housing the filter and fan, bordered by a metallic frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the first side, showing the smooth, continuous curve and clean edges.
attribute_vent_placement: Single vent opening located at the bottom front of the unit.
attribute_filter_design: Flat, rectangular filter area on the underside, likely mesh or baffle type, dark in color and integrated into the bottom panel.
